heading: Marine Corps Reserve Policy Board
label: 10304 Marine Corps Reserve Policy Board
text: A Marine Corps Reserve Policy Board shall be convened at least once annually at the seat of government to consider, recommend, and report to the Secretary of the Navy on reserve policy matters. At least half of the members of the Board must be officers of the Marine Corps Reserve.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 5252(c) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(3)(A)
